prompts.title: Passionate Musician in Dimly Lit Jazz Club
prompts.prompt: A captivating live music portrait of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are passionately performing on a saxophone (or guitar/piano) on a small stage inside an intimate jazz club. The subject is mid-performance, fully immersed in the music, with expressive posture and subtle motion in their hands. The background shows a softly blurred audience seated at small round tables, faint silhouettes, glasses reflecting light, and warm amber spotlights illuminating the stage. Hazy club atmosphere with gentle smoke and glowing stage lights creates a cinematic mood. Rich wooden interiors, vintage microphones, and subtle reflections enhance the authentic jazz club setting. Captured in a realistic music photography style with dramatic low-key lighting, deep contrast, and shallow depth of field to emphasize emotion and performance energy. Ultra-detailed textures, natural skin tones, and atmospheric lighting. Shot on a full-frame camera with a 90mm portrait lens at f/1.8 aperture, producing strong subject separation and creamy background bokeh. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Creative Street Artist in Vibrant Alley
prompts.prompt: A dynamic urban art photograph of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are actively creating a vibrant mural on a textured brick wall in a colorful alleyway, holding a spray can mid-motion, with expressive gestures that convey creativity and energy. The background features layers of street art, graffiti tags, murals, and visually interesting textures like worn brick, paint drips, and urban stickers, creating an authentic city atmosphere. Bright diffused daylight illuminates the scene, casting soft shadows and enhancing vivid colors. Captured in a realistic street photography style with energetic composition, motion detail, and immersive depth. Shot on a full-frame camera with a 35mm lens at f/2.0 aperture, providing natural perspective, moderate background separation, and sharp focus on the subject. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Scenic Photographer in Golden Hour Landscape
prompts.prompt: A striking silhouette of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are standing atop a hill during golden hour, holding a professional camera, poised to capture a breathtaking landscape. The sky is ablaze with warm orange, pink, and subtle purple hues, while soft, directional sunlight casts gentle highlights on distant mountains, valleys, and trees. The foreground shows subtle grass textures and natural hill contours, enhancing depth and scale. Captured in a realistic, cinematic landscape photography style with an evocative, artistic mood that emphasizes both the majesty of nature and the passion of photography. Shallow depth of field subtly isolates the subject while preserving the sweeping vista behind them. Shot on a full-frame camera with an 85mm lens at f/2.0 aperture, producing creamy bokeh around the subject and sharp silhouette detail. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Painter in a Sunlit Art Studio
prompts.prompt: A detailed artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are standing inside a sunlit art studio, holding a paintbrush while working on a large canvas filled with expressive brushstrokes. The studio is filled with canvases, paint tubes, and splashes of color. Warm natural light streams through a large window, illuminating the textures of paint and fabric. Shot with a 50mm lens at f/1.8, creating a balanced perspective and soft depth of field. Painterly aesthetic, cinematic realism, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Digital Illustrator in Neon Workspace
prompts.prompt: A futuristic illustration-style portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are seated at a digital workstation, sketching on a tablet surrounded by glowing screens displaying vibrant illustrations and concept art. Neon lighting in blue and magenta tones reflects across the workspace. Shot with a 35mm lens at f/1.6, emphasizing subject and glowing environment. High contrast, stylized realism, soft bokeh, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Sculptor in Stone Workshop
prompts.prompt: A realistic artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are standing in a traditional sculpture workshop, carving a stone sculpture with focused precision. Stone dust particles are visible in the air, and unfinished sculptures surround the space. Natural side lighting creates strong shadows and highlights on the textures. Shot with a 85mm lens at f/2.0 for strong subject isolation and fine detail. Classical, fine art atmosphere, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Calligraphy Artist in Minimal Studio
prompts.prompt: A refined artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are seated at a minimal wooden desk, carefully writing calligraphy with a traditional pen. The background is simple and elegant, with soft natural lighting and subtle shadows. Shot with a 70mm lens at f/2.2, creating a clean and focused composition. The scene emphasizes precision, detail, and calm artistic energy. Ultra-realistic textures, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Film Director on Cinematic Set
prompts.prompt: A cinematic art-inspired portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are standing on a film set, holding a clapperboard and directing a scene. The background includes soft blurred film lights, cameras, and crew equipment. Dramatic cinematic lighting with strong highlights and shadows. Shot with a 35mm lens at f/1.8, capturing depth and storytelling. Artistic, cinematic, highly detailed, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Tattoo Artist in Studio
prompts.prompt: A highly detailed artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are standing in a tattoo studio, working on a design with a tattoo machine in hand. The environment includes tattoo sketches, ink bottles, and a client chair softly blurred in the background. Moody lighting with strong contrast highlights the artistic process. Shot with a 50mm lens at f/1.4 for shallow depth of field and sharp subject focus. Realistic, expressive, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Glassblower in Artisan Workshop
prompts.prompt: A vivid artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are shaping molten glass in a traditional glassblowing workshop, with glowing orange glass glowing intensely. The workshop is dimly lit, with the glow from the furnace illuminating the subject. Shot with a 85mm lens at f/1.8, emphasizing subject and glowing materials. Dramatic lighting, rich textures, artistic realism, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Street Performer in Urban Night Scene
prompts.prompt: An expressive artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are performing on a street at night, surrounded by soft glowing lights and a small audience in the background. The scene includes bokeh city lights and reflective surfaces from wet pavement. Shot with a 35mm lens at f/1.6, capturing motion and atmosphere. Vibrant, cinematic night lighting, high contrast, 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Fashion Illustrator Sketching Designs
prompts.prompt: A refined artistic portrait of [Subject] with the subject’s natural facial features, skin tone, eye color, and hairstyle preserved exactly as they are. They are standing at a drafting table sketching fashion designs on paper. The workspace is filled with fabric samples, sketches, and design tools. Soft studio lighting creates a warm and creative atmosphere. Shot with a 70mm lens at f/2.0, producing elegant composition and depth. Artistic, detailed, fashion-focused, 9:16 aspect ratio.
